lines.nodeTitle: B2 — Force the lantern gate / pace trial
lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: Rowan drives the treadle into a hard, steady rhythm. Mara runs ahead while Garrick’s boots follow close behind.
lines.direction: A clear sustained pace trial in a stone gate corridor: Rowan’s boots drive a heavy floor treadle in a hard regular running rhythm, each press turning deep iron gears and lifting a counterweight chain. Mara’s lighter boots run several steps ahead while Garrick’s heavier boots remain close behind Rowan. Maintain spatial front-middle-rear separation and an even cadence. No voices, music, bells, or unrelated ambience.

lines.text: The third iron knock begins.
lines.direction: The third and final distant iron-grate warning: one urgent hollow impact beginning with a hard mechanical strike and blooming into a long wet tunnel echo over a strong current. Exactly one knock, heavier than the first two, no voices or music.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: Four bodies clear stone. Iron crashes behind them and the flood shears away below.
lines.direction: Fast sequence in a flooded stone passage: four people in boots and wet clothing scramble under a descending grate, the heavy iron grate crashes into its socket immediately behind them, and redirected floodwater tears downward into a deep channel. No voices, music, or combat sounds.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: Ahead, the Lantern Vault mechanism ticks backward—three bright clicks, one dull.
lines.direction: A precise ancient lock mechanism heard ahead in a quiet stone vault: three small bright brass clicks in reverse sequence, followed by one lower dull iron click. Repeat the four-part pattern once only. Clean mechanical detail, no clock, voices, or music.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: The third iron knock lands too soon. Water folds Mara under without a cry.
lines.direction: An urgent third iron warning knock echoes through a flooded tunnel; before its decay ends, a lateral surge of water hits an adult runner and submerges her completely. Heavy splash, clothing swallowed by current, no scream, no speech, no music.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: Edric dives. Leather draws taut; Garrick’s boots skid, catch, and hold.
lines.direction: Rescue Foley in rushing water: one clothed person dives hard into the current, a leather belt or strap whips tight under load, and another adult’s boots skid across wet stone before finding a groove and holding. Emphasize tension and weight, no voices or music.

lines.text: Mara breaks the surface coughing. The grate slams ahead of them.
lines.direction: A woman bursts above violent floodwater with two involuntary coughs and gasping breath; several metres ahead, a massive iron grate slams shut in stone and blocks the route. Natural human nonverbal coughing only, no words, no music.

lines.text: A small bronze disc spins beneath Rowan’s heel.

lines.text: The cracked bell note travels down the shaft. The token answers with a faint metallic ring.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: The chapel door takes one armoured blow.
lines.direction: One massive armoured shoulder strike against the outside of an old reinforced wooden chapel door. Deep wood boom, iron hinges and brace shudder, dust falls, but the door holds. Exactly one blow, no voices or music.

lines.text: A second blow cracks the door brace.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: A rusted floor hatch opens. Wind climbs out carrying the cracked bell’s low vibration.
lines.direction: A rusted iron floor hatch is dragged open on protesting hinges. Cold wind rises from a deep vertical shaft below, carrying the low sympathetic vibration of the distant cracked siege bell through stone. Dark vertical depth, no voices or music.
lines.requestText: A rusted iron floor hatch is dragged open on protesting hinges. Cold wind rises from a deep vertical shaft below, carrying the low sympathetic vibration of the distant cracked siege bell through stone. Dark vertical depth, no voices or music.

lines.speaker: ROWAN — THOUGHT
lines.text: Garrick’s hand stays in Edric’s coat until the last possible breath. Whatever is sewn there will remain beside the man he killed.
lines.requestText: [quietly] [intimate, reflective, breath-aware] Garrick’s hand stays in Edric’s coat until the last possible breath. Whatever is sewn there will remain beside the man he killed.
lines.nextText: No rungs.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: No rungs.
lines.requestText: [clipped, grief-struck, trying to stay useful] No rungs.
lines.previousText: Garrick’s hand stays in Edric’s coat until the last possible breath. Whatever is sewn there will remain beside the man he killed.
lines.nextText: There is a chain. Wrap it once. We descend by feel.

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: There is a chain. Wrap it once. We descend by feel.
lines.requestText: [steady, low, commanding] There is a chain. Wrap it once. We descend by feel.
lines.nextText: Rowan, do we take the chain into the shaft?

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: The door bursts inward as the hatch closes overhead.
lines.direction: Two simultaneous but clearly staged events: an iron floor hatch slams closed directly overhead, then a reinforced chapel door bursts inward farther away with exploding wood, iron hardware, and armoured momentum. Stone-room impact, no voices or music.
lines.requestText: Two simultaneous but clearly staged events: an iron floor hatch slams closed directly overhead, then a reinforced chapel door bursts inward farther away with exploding wood, iron hardware, and armoured momentum. Stone-room impact, no voices or music.

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: Rowan, do we take the chain into the shaft?
lines.requestText: [direct, urgent, trusting] Rowan, do we take the chain into the shaft?
lines.previousText: There is a chain. Wrap it once. We descend by feel.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: The treadle holds its rhythm. Mara clears the gate, Rowan follows, and Garrick dives through just before the iron crashes safely behind them.
lines.direction: Successful medieval gate crossing in one clear sequence: a floor treadle maintains a fast steady boot rhythm while gears and counterweight chain hold an iron portcullis high; Mara’s boots clear first, Rowan’s second, and Garrick’s heavy boots dive through last. The portcullis crashes safely into stone immediately behind Garrick. No voices, injuries, music, or patrol sounds.
lines.requestText: Successful medieval gate crossing in one clear sequence: a floor treadle maintains a fast steady boot rhythm while gears and counterweight chain hold an iron portcullis high; Mara’s boots clear first, Rowan’s second, and Garrick’s heavy boots dive through last. The portcullis crashes safely into stone immediately behind Garrick. No voices, injuries, music, or patrol sounds.

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: We are through.
lines.requestText: [breathless relief] [still alert] We are through.
lines.nextText: The key. Give it back.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: The key. Give it back.
lines.requestText: [clipped, grief-struck, trying to stay useful] The key. Give it back.
lines.nextText: Which one names the traitor?

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: The brass key unlocks an inner cabinet. Hundreds of thin metal ledger leaves unfold with a dry metallic whisper.
lines.direction: Inside a silent stone Lantern Vault, a heavy brass keeper key enters and unlocks a smaller inner ledger cabinet with precise pins and one clean release. The cabinet opens and hundreds of extremely thin engraved metal ledger leaves mechanically fan outward, brushing together in a dry delicate metallic whisper. No voices, magic shimmer, music, or gate crash.
lines.requestText: Inside a silent stone Lantern Vault, a heavy brass keeper key enters and unlocks a smaller inner ledger cabinet with precise pins and one clean release. The cabinet opens and hundreds of extremely thin engraved metal ledger leaves mechanically fan outward, brushing together in a dry delicate metallic whisper. No voices, magic shimmer, music, or gate crash.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: Which one names the traitor?
lines.requestText: [raw, guarded, searching] Which one names the traitor?
lines.nextText: None that I can read.

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: None that I can read.
lines.requestText: [quiet, grim realization] None that I can read.
lines.nextText: Edric could.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: Edric could.
lines.requestText: [clipped, grief-struck, trying to stay useful] Edric could.
lines.nextText: Yes.

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: Yes.
lines.requestText: [steady, low, commanding] Yes.
lines.nextText: I held the pace and kept Garrick with us. The key brought us to the truth, but killing Edric took away its language. We reached the ledger. We cannot read it.

lines.speaker: ROWAN — THOUGHT
lines.text: I held the pace and kept Garrick with us. The key brought us to the truth, but killing Edric took away its language. We reached the ledger. We cannot read it.
lines.requestText: [quietly] [intimate, reflective, breath-aware] I held the pace and kept Garrick with us. The key brought us to the truth, but killing Edric took away its language. We reached the ledger. We cannot read it.
lines.nextText: Then we start with the mark on the key.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: Then we start with the mark on the key.
lines.requestText: [clipped, grief-struck, trying to stay useful] Then we start with the mark on the key.
lines.previousText: I held the pace and kept Garrick with us. The key brought us to the truth, but killing Edric took away its language. We reached the ledger. We cannot read it.
lines.nextText: Rowan, do we press the key’s mark against the first seal?

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: Rowan, do we press the key’s mark against the first seal?
lines.requestText: [direct, urgent, trusting] Rowan, do we press the key’s mark against the first seal?
lines.previousText: Then we start with the mark on the key.

lines.speaker: SFX
lines.text: The Lantern Gate crashes down between Rowan and Garrick.
lines.direction: An extremely loud massive iron Lantern Gate drops at full speed and crashes into a deep stone socket at close range. One overwhelming portcullis impact with violent iron resonance, stone vibration, and a long heavy decay through a narrow medieval corridor. Make the sudden barrier feel physically final. No chain prelude, footsteps, voices, combat, or music.
lines.requestText: An extremely loud massive iron Lantern Gate drops at full speed and crashes into a deep stone socket at close range. One overwhelming portcullis impact with violent iron resonance, stone vibration, and a long heavy decay through a narrow medieval corridor. Make the sudden barrier feel physically final. No chain prelude, footsteps, voices, combat, or music.

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: Garrick!
lines.requestText: [screaming his name] [sudden fear] Garrick!
lines.nextText: I am here.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: I am here.
lines.direction: [muffled through an iron gate] [breathless but controlled, preparing to fight]
lines.requestText: [muffled through an iron gate] [breathless but controlled, preparing to fight] I am here.
lines.nextText: Are you hurt?

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: Are you hurt?
lines.direction: [softly] [deeply concerned, careful and afraid of the answer]
lines.requestText: [softly] [deeply concerned, careful and afraid of the answer] Are you hurt?
lines.nextText: No. The key is still with me.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: No. The key is still with me.
lines.direction: [muffled through an iron gate] [breathless but controlled, preparing to fight]
lines.requestText: [muffled through an iron gate] [breathless but controlled, preparing to fight] No. The key is still with me.
lines.nextText: The patrol is behind you.

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: The patrol is behind you.
lines.requestText: [urgent] [fear rising despite her control] The patrol is behind you.
lines.previousText: No. The key is still with me.
lines.nextText: Find another way to open the gate. I will hold them.

lines.speaker: Garrick
lines.text: Find another way to open the gate. I will hold them.
lines.direction: [muffled through an iron gate] [breathless but controlled, preparing to fight]
lines.requestText: [muffled through an iron gate] [breathless but controlled, preparing to fight] Find another way to open the gate. I will hold them.
lines.nextText: There is a release wheel on our side. Rowan, help me move it before they reach him!

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: There is a release wheel on our side. Rowan, help me move it before they reach him!
lines.requestText: [shouting through iron] [desperate but commanding] There is a release wheel on our side. Rowan, help me move it before they reach him!
lines.previousText: Find another way to open the gate. I will hold them.
lines.nextText: Rowan, do we force the release wheel now, or search for another way?

lines.speaker: Mara
lines.text: Rowan, do we force the release wheel now, or search for another way?
lines.requestText: [shouting through iron] [desperate but commanding] Rowan, do we force the release wheel now, or search for another way?
lines.previousText: There is a release wheel on our side. Rowan, help me move it before they reach him!
